prompt: A hyper-realistic studio photograph of an intricate metal sculpture made of dozens of twisting rods, loops, and intersecting geometric shapes mounted on a pedestal. A single bright spotlight shines from the side, casting a large shadow onto a smooth white wall. The sculpture itself appears dense, chaotic, and multi-layered in three-dimensional space, while the shadow projected onto the wall becomes a much simpler flattened pattern of lines and shapes. The composition highlights the transformation from complex 3D structure to a simplified 2D projection. Dramatic studio lighting creates sharp contrast between the sculpture and its shadow, emphasizing depth and dimensional collapse. Ultra-detailed metallic textures, subtle reflections on the rods, cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, realistic studio environment. No text, no diagrams, no symbols.
metaphor: A complex 3D sculpture casting a simpler 2D shadow, representing high-dimensional data projected into a lower-dimensional representation.
